items.body:
## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- 🔄 **pnpm-lock conflict**: The PR has a merge conflict in `pnpm-lock.yaml` (`mergeable_state: dirty`). Follow the [conflict guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md) to resolve this before CI can run.

🔴 **Tool Issue** — `CHANGELOG.md:871`

The CHANGELOG is missing the previously-released version entries. The current `main` branch CHANGELOG includes:
```
## 1.0.2 (Unreleased)
## 1.0.1 (2025-08-22)
```
Both entries are absent from this PR — only `2.0.0` and `1.0.0` appear. The generation tool appears to have overwritten the existing CHANGELOG without preserving historical entries.

**Fix:** Restore the missing `1.0.1 (2025-08-22)` and `1.0.2 (Unreleased)` entries between `2.0.0` and `1.0.0`, and report this in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

1 tool issue found in `@azure/arm-managednetworkfabric` 2.0.0 (TypeSpec migration from Swagger-based 1.0.x). The public API surface looks clean — no naming clashes, no `unknown` return types, no alpha versions, and version consistency checks pass across `package.json`, `CHANGELOG.md`, and the context file. One tool issue was identified in the CHANGELOG.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37932,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/managednetworkfabric/arm-managednetworkfabric/CHANGELOG.md","line":871,"issueType":"tool","category":"changelog","description":"Missing 1.0.1 (2025-08-22) and 1.0.2 (Unreleased) entries — generator overwrote existing CHANGELOG history"}]}
```

</details>
